steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage describes domestication involving "selective breeding" and refers to "this millennia-long process." The strongest signal is the TIME SCALE of the transformation: it emphasizes that the process took many generations.

steps.title: Match the signal
steps.content:
The logical relationship is sequence/manner — the blank describes how the domestication process unfolded over time, bridging the start (~6,000 years ago) and the ongoing process that eventually produced Equus caballus.
  • Choice A — "To further illustrate this timeline,": promises a new timeline example, but the sentence states the core fact (selective breeding for transportation and plowing) rather than illustrating the timeline with an additional data point. ✗
  • Choice B — "Over the course of many generations,": conveys the gradual, multi-generational nature of selective breeding, matching the passage's emphasis on a "millennia-long process." ✓
  • Choice C — "Similar to the process that began thousands of years ago,": illogically compares the process to itself — the sentence is describing the same process mentioned in the opening, not a parallel one. ✗
  • Choice D — "As a result of being domesticated,": implies the selective breeding happened because the horses were already domesticated, reversing the actual cause-and-effect relationship. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
